leadText: Lemonade (Japanese: ミックスオレ Mix au Lait) is a type of medicine introduced in Generation I. It is a drink that restores a Pokémon's HP.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 Manual activation 1.1.1 Generation I to VI 1.1.2 Generation VII onward 1.2 Other uses Effect [ edit | edit source ] Manual activation [ edit | edit source ] Generation I to VI [ edit | edit source ] When used from the Bag on a Pokémon, it heals the Pokémon by 80 HP . It is consumed after use. Generation VII onward [ edit | edit source ] When used from the Bag on a Pokémon, it heals the Pokémon by 70 HP . It is consumed after use. Other uses [ edit | edit source ] In the Kanto -based games, it can be given to a thirsty girl at the Celadon Department Store in exchange for TM49 ( Tri Attack ) R B Y , TM33 ( Reflect ) FR LG , or TM07 ( Protect ) P E . In the Generation I games, the player can give a Fresh Water , Soda Pop , or Lemonade to one of the Saffron City guards to be granted access to the city. In Pokémon FireRed and LeafGreen , the player can leave a Lemonade at Memorial Pillar to receive TM42 ( Facade ).

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Stad Restores HP that have been lost in battle by 80 HP. G S C Restores Pok é mon HP by 80. R S E Colo XD A very sweet drink that restores HP by 80 points. FR LG A very sweet drink. It restores the HP of one Pok é mon by 80 points. D P Pt HG SS B W B2 W2 A very sweet drink. It restores the HP of one Pokémon by 80 points. X Y OR AS A very sweet and refreshing drink. When consumed, it restores 80 HP to an injured Pokémon. S M US UM A very sweet and refreshing drink. When consumed, it restores up to 70 HP to an injured Pokémon. P E Sw Sh BD SP LA A very sweet and refreshing drink. It can be used to restore 70 HP to a single Pokémon. S V ZA A very sweet and refreshing drink. It can be used to restore 70 HP to a Pokémon.

Chimney Cable Car stations in Hoenn and on Alola Route 13 . It can be bought at a cheaper price of $ 300 from the Vending Machines at the Team Magma Hideout and Team Aqua Hideout . In the Generation V games, it can be sold to the gourmet maniac on Route 5 for $ 350. In Pokémon FireRed and LeafGreen , the player can leave a Lemonade at Memorial Pillar to receive TM42 ( Facade ).
